subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of Abdul Baha! In this Divine Dispensation and lordly Cycle the fundamental principle and the supreme object is the establishment of the oneness of the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء در این دور الهی و عصر ربانی اساس اصلی و مقصد حقیقی وحدت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion
